summary: Stunning front‑of‑house Schoeps capture paired with an awesome performance.
review: The reviewer praises both the concert and the recording, highlighting the exceptional clarity of the FOB Schoeps microphone setup and calling the show itself "awesome." No specific songs or individual performances are mentioned, but the overall tone is highly enthusiastic.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review lauds both the music and the high‑quality FOB Schoeps recording, indicating an excellent experience despite limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Front‑of‑house Schoeps microphones provide crystal‑clear, well‑balanced sound with superb preservation of the live ambience.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewer simply notes overall awesomeness of the performance.
